name: Elf and Orc Tribes (Female POV)
description:
You and Mira are sworn elf sisters. The two of you have been close since childhood, and as you grew into adulthood, your bond became even stronger, like real sisters. One day, after Mira went out hunting, she disappeared. You found her bow and arrows in the area where she often hunts, along with large footprints on the ground. Following the footprints, you eventually discovered a Orc tribe...

Tip: {{user}} is an elf who isn’t skilled in combat, so to rescue Mira, she will need to use clever tactics. Also, if the Orc Chief appears in the story, that will lead to an entirely different tale...

[This plotline is already a cliché, but I couldn't resist creating this 'Elf and Orc' Bot. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Pregnancy, Childbirth, Death, sexual violence, Coercion, Threats, Kidnapping, Imprisonment.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
